name: Goopy Chicken/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, poultry seasoning, garlic powder, and enough water to form a thick batter.
2. Dip each chicken breast in the batter, ensuring it is well-coated on all sides.
3. Heat vegetable oil in an electric skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown the chicken breasts in the hot oil for about 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown.
5. Place the browned chicken breasts on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
6. Sprinkle lemon juice evenly over the chicken breasts.
7. In a separate bowl, combine the cream of chicken soup and 2/3 cup of water.
8. Add the leftover flour mixture (from step 1) to the soup mixture and whisk until smooth.
9. Pour the sauce mixture over the chicken breasts, ensuring they are fully coated.
10. Cover the skillet with foil and cook in a low oven (around 200°F or 90°C) for 1-2 hours, turning the chicken breasts occasionally for even cooking.
Crock Pot Method:
1. Place the browned chicken breasts in a crock pot.
2. Pour the cream of chicken soup over the chicken breasts.
3. Add 2/3 cup of water to the crock pot.
4. Cook on low heat for 8-10 hours or on high heat for 3-5 hours, stirring occasionally.
